page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 64 physical Intel Xeon 8269CY cores, operating at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system deployment and data persistence. It also lacks dedicated GPU hardware accelerators. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps, supporting stable inter-instance communication and data transfers.

Given the dedicated physical core allocation and high clock speed, the ecs.hfg6.16xlarge offers predictable compute performance without hyperthreading interference. This makes it highly efficient for workloads requiring consistent CPU execution, such as high-performance web serving, application servers, build systems, and general-purpose enterprise databases that benefit from a balanced 1:4 memory-to-core ratio.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is a KVM-standardized x86_64 server instance configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz, this instance allocates one physical core per vCPU with no hyperthreading, ensuring predictable compute performance. The system features a balanced 1:4 memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and stable performance, such as enterprise application hosting, web serving, and general-purpose database deployments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.16xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY cores at 3.1 GHz, 256.0 GB of RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth for predictable general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core Intel Xeon server with a balanced memory profile and twenty gigabits of baseline network bandwidth.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 core-to-RAM ratio
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for stable data transfer
Zero local storage and no GPU accelerators included
Suitable for enterprise application hosting and general-purpose databases
